description_long: This shotgun features a classic design with a dark metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a smooth, unvented rib and no visible muzzle attachments. The wooden stock is full-sized, with a rich brown finish and a slightly curved butt for shoulder support. The fore-end is also wooden, ribbed for grip, and positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel and receiver, paired with a full wooden stock and ribbed wooden fore-end. The design is classic and functional, with a rounded trigger guard and no visible muzzle attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and long metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
